requirement_topic.en: Marshall Islands Market Access — Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities, Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities, Marshalls Energy Company (MEC)and Nascent EV Deployment
requirement_topic.zh: 马绍尔群岛市场准入——马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局、马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局、马绍尔群岛电力照明公司（MEC）及起步阶段电动汽车部署
requirement_topic.zht: 馬紹爾群島市場准入——馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局、馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局、馬紹爾群島電力照明公司（MEC）及起步階段電動汽車部署

summary.en: The Marshall Islands Bureau of Standards and Quality is the national standards body, Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities regulates utilities and communications, and Marshall Islands Power and Light is the main electricity utility. The EV charging market is nascent, so exporters should not assume that a single mature EVSE certification rule covers every product. Instead, market entry should be mapped by importer, HS code, charger type, rated voltage, radio functions, utility connection, site permits, labelling, safety evidence, and project-owner requirements. Public, hotel, fleet, marina, and government installations may impose different procurement conditions.
summary.zh: 马绍尔群岛标准和质量局是马绍尔群岛国家标准机构，马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局监管公用事业和通信，马绍尔群岛电力照明公司是主要电力公司。马绍尔群岛电动汽车充电市场仍处于起步阶段，出口商不应假设已有单一成熟EVSE认证规则覆盖所有产品。市场准入应按进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型、额定电压、无线功能、公用事业接入、现场许可、标签、安全证据和项目业主要求逐项映射。公共、酒店、车队、码头和政府安装可能提出不同采购条件。
summary.zht: 馬紹爾群島標準和質量局是馬紹爾群島國家標準機構，馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局監管公用事業和通訊，馬紹爾群島電力照明公司是主要電力公司。馬紹爾群島電動汽車充電市場仍處於起步階段，出口商不應假設已有單一成熟EVSE認證規則覆蓋所有產品。市場准入應按進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型、額定電壓、無線功能、公用事業接入、現場許可、標籤、安全證據和項目業主要求逐項映射。公共、酒店、車隊、碼頭和政府安裝可能提出不同採購條件。

standards_or_laws: Marshall Islands Bureau of Standards and Quality standards and conformity-assessment context
Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities utilities and communications regulatory context
Marshall Islands Power and Light project and service connection requirements
Importer, customs, tender, and site-owner requirements for EV charging equipment

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930 communication for DC charging, and China domestic conformity or grid-acceptance requirements. These documents may support engineering review but do not establish Marshall Islands market access, Marshalls Energy Company (MEC)connection acceptance, Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities radio acceptance, or project procurement approval.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流充电GB/T 27930通信，以及中国国内合格评定或并网验收要求准备文件。这些文件可支持工程审查，但不能证明马绍尔群岛市场准入、马绍尔群岛电力照明公司（MEC）接入验收、马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局无线电接受或项目采购批准。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流充電GB/T 27930通訊，以及中國國內合格評定或併網驗收要求準備文件。這些文件可支持工程審查，但不能證明馬紹爾群島市場准入、馬紹爾群島電力照明公司（MEC）接入驗收、馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局無線電接受或項目採購批准。

gap.en: Before claiming Marshall Islands readiness, exporters should confirm the importer of record, customs classification, Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities standards route, Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities requirements for wireless modules, Marshalls Energy Company (MEC)connection process, local electrical contractor role, J1772 / CCS1 connector specification, 120/240 V 60 Hz revalidation, hurricane-prone outdoor installation evidence, and project-specific documentation. China CCC, CQC, or GB/T files alone should not be presented as a Marshall Islands approval.
gap.zh: 在宣称充电桩适用于马绍尔群岛前，出口商应确认进口记录方、海关归类、马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局标准路径、无线模块马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局要求、马绍尔群岛电力照明公司（MEC）接入流程、当地电气承包商角色、J1772 / CCS1接口规格、120/240 V 60 Hz重新验证、飓风多发户外安装证据，以及项目特定文件。中国CCC、CQC或GB/T文件本身不应被表述为马绍尔群岛批准。
gap.zht: 在宣稱充電樁適用於馬紹爾群島前，出口商應確認進口記錄方、海關歸類、馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局標準路徑、無線模組馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局要求、馬紹爾群島電力照明公司（MEC）接入流程、當地電氣承包商角色、J1772 / CCS1接口規格、120/240 V 60 Hz重新驗證、颶風多發戶外安裝證據，以及項目特定文件。中國CCC、CQC或GB/T文件本身不應被表述為馬紹爾群島批准。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — exact product conformity, import, utility, telecom, and project requirements must be verified with Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities, Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities, Marshalls Energy Company (MEC), customs, importer, and project owner for the specific charger and HS code
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic certification and GB/T evidence are not Marshall Islands market-access approvals

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Marshall Islands EV charging market is nascent, so do not rely on a generic GB/T or China certification package. Map Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities, Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities, Marshalls Energy Company (MEC), customs, importer, and project requirements for the exact charger before quoting or shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 马绍尔群岛电动汽车充电市场仍处于起步阶段，不应依赖通用GB/T或中国认证资料包。报价或发货前，应针对具体充电桩映射马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局、马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局、马绍尔群岛电力照明公司（MEC）、海关、进口商和项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 馬紹爾群島電動汽車充電市場仍處於起步階段，不應依賴通用GB/T或中國認證資料包。報價或發貨前，應針對具體充電樁映射馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局、馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局、馬紹爾群島電力照明公司（MEC）、海關、進口商和項目要求。
